original_image_tags: Back of a yellowed, aged document page. Top edge is torn. Two hole-punch marks at the top. The paper shows faint, reversed (bleed-through) text from the front side, and several stamped impressions, some of which are reversed. Stamps and handwritten marks are visible.

elements.description: A scanned document page with torn edges, holes at the top, and very faint reversed typed text visible through the paper. Multiple red and purple ink stamps are present at the bottom, including legible dates 'AUG 2 1947' and 'NOV 19 1947'. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or charts are visible.

judge.reason: Both agree on the core visual elements of a document page with torn edges, hole-punch marks, and faded bleed-through, but Description B adds specific, uncontradicted details about stamp colors and dates that Description A does not mention.
